zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton於1414年9月8日出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親William Brereton25歲，母親Alice Corbet25歲。他於1489年8月22日與Matilda Dutton結婚。他在英國被列為sir knight - 11th lord of brereton。他去世於1496年10月18日在英國爾切斯特享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton was born on 8 September 1414, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, William Brereton, was 25 and his mother, Alice Corbet, was 25. He married Matilda Dutton on 22 August 1489. His occupation is listed as sir knight - 11th lord of brereton in United Kingdom. He died on 18 October 1496, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton est né le 8 septembre 1414, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Brereton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Corbet, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Dutton le 22 août 1489. Sa profession de son indiquée est sir knight - 11th lord of brereton à Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1496, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton am 8. September 1414 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Brereton 25 und seine Mutter Alice Corbet 25. Er hat am 22. August 1489 Matilda Dutton geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als sir knight - 11th lord of brereton in United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1496 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton è nato il il 8 settembre 1414 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William Brereton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Corbet, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Dutton il 22 agosto 1489. La sua occupazione è indicata come sir knight - 11th lord of brereton nel Regno Unito. Morì il 18 ottobre 1496, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Breretonが1414年9月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父William Breretonは25歳，母Alice Corbetは25歳であった。1489年8月22日にMatilda Duttonと結婚した。イギリスでの職業はsir knight - 11th lord of breretonと記録されている。彼は1496年10月18日にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton(이)가 1414년 9월 8일 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Corbet(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1489년 8월 22일 Matilda Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 sir knight - 11th lord of brereton이었다. 그는 1496년 10월 18일 영국 체실르 체스터에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 September 1414–18 October 1496: 8 de setembro de 1414–18 de outubro de 1496
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1414, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brereton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Corbet, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Dutton em 22 de agosto de 1489. Sua profissão aparece como sir knight - 11th lord of brereton em United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1496, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton родился 8 сентября 1414 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brereton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Corbet, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Dutton 22 августа 1489 г.  Он работал по профессии sir knight - 11th lord of brereton в местности Великобритания. Он умер 18 октября 1496 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.8 September 1414–18 October 1496: 8 de septiembre de 1414–18 de octubre de 1496
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton nació el 8 de septiembre de 1414, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Brereton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Corbet, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Matilda Dutton el 22 de agosto de 1489. Su ocupación registrada era sir knight - 11th lord of brereton en Reino Unido. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1496, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
